name: sydra-data-pipeline
description: Entity-SEO data pipeline for Sydra: ingest CMS IDR Public Use Files + Transparency-in-Coverage MRFs into staging tables and publish real benchmark/outcome data into the app's idr_benchmarks / idr_state_profiles (flipping data_source seed -> puf/mrf).

scripts.pipeline:all: npm run idr:load && npm run publish
